channel.title: REPOSSESSED - Development Log
channel.description: Development Log for there upcoming Immersiv Sim REPOSSESSED.

item.title: RE//POSSESSED - 2026.03.20 - Moved Domain (!!! IMPORTANT: PLEASE UPDATE YOUR RSS-FEED URL! IT CHANGED! THIS IS ONLY A PERMANENT REMINDER!!!)
item.description: !!! IMPORTANT: PLEASE UPDATE YOUR RSS-FEED URL! IT CHANGED! THIS IS ONLY A PERMANENT REMINDER!!! Not much to say. For a multitude of reasons I moved the RE/POSSESSED Website from it's subdomain to it own host and Domain. Nothing else changed. I tried updating all links and create forwards where possible.
